description: Whether the provider auto-generates persistent rules from conversation context. Distinct from user-authored rules — these are AI-created and stored separately.

amp.mechanism: Amp does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

claude-code.mechanism: Auto memory saves Claude's accumulated notes to ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/MEMORY.md; requires CC v2.1.59+; enabled by default

cline.mechanism: Cline does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system distinct from user-authored rules

codex.mechanism: Codex does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not have an AI-generated persistent memory system for rules

factory-droid.mechanism: Factory Droid does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

gemini-cli.mechanism: memory_command: Gemini CLI /memory command saves notes that persist across sessions as rule-like content

kiro.mechanism: Kiro does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system separate from user-authored steering files

pi.mechanism: Pi does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

windsurf.mechanism: auto_generated_memories: Windsurf AI generates persistent memories stored in .windsurf/memories/ as rule-like files
